# Product Tower Kit

> Vietnamese-first, ADHD-friendly product management toolkit for Claude Code. 14-tier framework with anti-bias enforcement, PMF gate system, and 5 specialized agents.

## Documentation

- [Project Overview & PDR](docs/project-overview-pdr.md): Project identity, target audience, problem statement, solution, pricing, success metrics, timeline, and competitive landscape
- [Codebase Summary](docs/codebase-summary.md): LOC breakdown, directory structure, 3-language stack, 6 systems, dependencies, testing strategy, and state management
- [Code Standards](docs/code-standards.md): File naming conventions, SKILL.md format, agent format, command format, Python/PowerShell/Node.js standards, and git conventions
- [System Architecture](docs/system-architecture.md): High-level architecture diagram, gate system design (19-tier DAG), PMF scoring, confidence tagging, data flow, and integration points
- [Quickstart Guide](docs/quickstart.md): Installation, initialization, step-by-step workflow, CLI commands, and Claude Code slash commands
- [Ecosystem Map](resources/ecosystem-map.md): Skill-agent-tier routing, master orchestration chain, and 12 skills + 5 agents mapping

## Skills

- [product-tower](/.claude/skills/product-tower/SKILL.md): Master orchestrator вЂ” 14-tier framework overview, routing table, anti-bias rules, gate enforcement
- [market-research](/.claude/skills/market-research/SKILL.md): T0 Market Research вЂ” 2 modes (Express/Pro), Deep Research integration, saturation check
- [market-segmentation](/.claude/skills/market-segmentation/SKILL.md): T1-T3 вЂ” Target market selection, 3-5 segments, segment filter
- [user-discovery](/.claude/skills/user-discovery/SKILL.md): T4-T6 вЂ” Behavior-based personas, ImpactГ—Frequency needs, 4-criteria unmet filter
- [pmf-validator](/.claude/skills/pmf-validator/SKILL.md): T7 PMF Validation вЂ” 10 signals (/50), Sean Ellis Test, penalty system, HARD GATE в‰Ґ30/50
- [pricing-strategy](/.claude/skills/pricing-strategy/SKILL.md): T9.5 Offer Bridge вЂ” 6 pricing models, Hormozi Value Equation, WTP validation
- [competitor-analysis](/.claude/skills/competitor-analysis/SKILL.md): T0-CP вЂ” Positioning map, Peter Thiel moat analysis (4 types)
- [deep-research-parser](/.claude/skills/deep-research-parser/SKILL.md): Pre-T0 вЂ” Parse Deep Research markdown в†’ pre-fill T0-T6, gap report
- [analytics-feedback](/.claude/skills/analytics-feedback/SKILL.md): T14 вЂ” Monthly feedback loop (Measureв†’Learnв†’Iterate), churn/NPS triggers
- [delivery-tower](/.claude/skills/delivery-tower/SKILL.md): D1-D6 вЂ” GTMв†’UXв†’UIв†’Metricsв†’Launchв†’Review, requires T8+T9 + PMFв‰Ґ30
- [sales-tower](/.claude/skills/sales-tower/SKILL.md): S0-S9 вЂ” Hormozi framework, Grand Slam Offer, CLOSER script, Core Four lead gen
- [product-sale](/.claude/skills/product-sale/SKILL.md): Unified BUILD+SELL вЂ” 3 modes: BUILD ONLY / SELL ONLY / BUILD+SELL

## Agents

- [product-planner](/.claude/agents/product-planner.md): Plan tier progression, detect blockers, suggest next steps (sequential mode)
- [market-researcher](/.claude/agents/market-researcher.md): Collect market data, validate sources, score confidence (parallel mode)
- [anti-bias-challenger](/.claude/agents/anti-bias-challenger.md): AB1-AB6 enforcement, red team, strategic analysis (adversarial mode)
- [pmf-validator](/.claude/agents/pmf-validator.md): Score 10 PMF signals, GO/NO-GO decision, pivot suggestions (analytical mode)
- [feature-scoper](/.claude/agents/feature-scoper.md): MoSCoW features, ImpactГ—Effort matrix, user stories (collaborative mode)

## Commands

- [/pt:init](/.claude/commands/pt-init.md): Initialize project with data/ directory and pipeline_state.json
- [/pt:research](/.claude/commands/pt-research.md): Run T0 market research with market-researcher agent
- [/pt:validate](/.claude/commands/pt-validate.md): Run T7 PMF validation with pmf-validator agent
- [/pt:scope](/.claude/commands/pt-scope.md): Run T8-T9 feature scoping with feature-scoper agent
- [/pt:assess](/.claude/commands/pt-assess.md): Quick health check вЂ” score all tiers 0-3, tower score /42
- [/pt:status](/.claude/commands/pt-status.md): Show pipeline status вЂ” completed, skipped, PMF, anti-bias
- [/pt:report](/.claude/commands/pt-report.md): Generate full product tower report

## Hooks

- [gate-check.sh](/.claude/hooks/gate-check.sh): PreToolUse hook вЂ” auto-block writes to data/t*.md if prerequisites missing
- [pmf-alert.sh](/.claude/hooks/pmf-alert.sh): PostToolUse hook вЂ” alert when PMF output shows NO-GO/BLOCKED
- [tier-progress.sh](/.claude/hooks/tier-progress.sh): SessionStart hook вЂ” show current tier progress on session start

## Rules

- [product-workflow](/.claude/rules/product-workflow.md): Core workflow rules вЂ” 9-step process, gate rules, anti-bias rules, confidence tagging
- [gate-enforcement](/.claude/rules/gate-enforcement.md): Gate enforcement rules вЂ” tier dependencies, force skip logic, PMF gate
- [anti-bias-rules](/.claude/rules/anti-bias-rules.md): Anti-bias rules вЂ” AB1-AB6 definitions, purpose, rules, output files, PMF bonuses

## Scripts

- [gate_checker.py](scripts/gate_checker.py): Python gate enforcement CLI вЂ” init, check, complete, pmf, status, assess, naming
- [harness-health.ps1](scripts/harness-health.ps1): PowerShell health check вЂ” 70+ checks across all components
- [harness-eval.ps1](scripts/harness-eval.ps1): PowerShell harness evaluator вЂ” runs health + syntax + gate tests
- [invariant-checks.js](scripts/invariant-checks.js): Node.js invariant checks вЂ” package, skills, agents, commands, hooks, gate consistency
- [syntax-check.js](scripts/syntax-check.js): Node.js syntax validation вЂ” Node.js, Python, JSON, SKILL.md frontmatter

## Templates

- [product-plan](templates/product-plan.md): Full product plan template вЂ” T0в†’T14 with sections for each tier

## CLI

- [product-tower.js](bin/product-tower.js): CLI entry point вЂ” init, check, complete, pmf, status, assess, naming, version

## Config

- [package.json](package.json): npm package config вЂ” zero dependencies, Node.js в‰Ґ18
- [settings.json](/.claude/settings.json): Hook configuration вЂ” PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart hooks
- [index.js](index.js): Module exports вЂ” KIT_ROOT, SKILLS_DIR, SCRIPTS_DIR, getVersion(), getSkills()
